rules: Never use em dashes (—) or en dashes (–) in any output. Use commas, colons, or rephrase instead.
Keep emails under 120 words in the body. Be concise.
Do not use the phrase 'I hope this finds you well' or any similar filler opener.
notes: These rules apply to all AI-generated email copy. Edit freely — changes take effect on the next pipeline run.
